title: Super Mario Bros. Game Genie Corruption 2
description:
This is the second Super Mario Bros. Game Genie Corruption video! There are more interesting iterations than the first video. Instead of using one code on each corruption scene, I've decided to enable multiple codes to get things more amusing. It took some time to do each of them perfectly because usually I mess up or the game freezes itself at some point. There are 8 corruption scenes to watch, most of them which has to do with graphic and behavioral errors. So watch and enjoy the video!

More corruption videos coming soon.
